workstreams.remaining: Add reviewer-pass evidence for the fresh-telemetry routing policy pilot before changing defaults.
Add compaction or promotion receipts if durable memory grows large, and consider pause/resume memory hooks.
Add measurable hotspot gates before any Rust expansion, CuPy service, or GPU retrieval work.

next_system_targets: Add post-default monitoring and rollback receipts before treating any routing policy as safely deployed.
Keep default orchestration changes behind post-canary lineage, exact token, correction, quality, accuracy, and wall-time receipts.
Keep routing-policy-review receipts required before default orchestration changes.
Keep fresh-telemetry policy-pilot receipts promotion candidates only after replay and overlap guards stay green.
Use agent:routing:policy receipts before changing orchestration defaults from routing-suite evidence.
Keep routing policy promotion conditional until independent workload pilots validate exact token, correction, speed, accuracy, and quality outcomes.
Use v2 routing-suite telemetry lineage refs for every future orchestration routing proof.
Use path-backed routing suites on bounded real workloads before changing default orchestration policy.
Use AIPEDIA_OBSERVED_DIRTY_BEFORE_AGENT when running Rust runner closeouts in a dirty tree.
Collect real runtime usage payloads from any orchestrator or subagent execution and pass them through --model-token-usage, AIPEDIA_MODEL_TOKEN_USAGE_FILE, or AIPEDIA_MODEL_TOKEN_USAGE_JSON.
Resolve separate content WIP, refresh page-ledger input with the receipt-visible refresh plan, rerun npm run agent:proof:readiness -- --json, then run the page-refresh positive policy proof.
Defer Rust expansion, CuPy, or GPU acceleration until measured hotspots justify them.
